summary: Iteration 3 testing completed - Autonomous Prospecting feature fully functional. Backend 100% working (all 9 endpoints tested via curl). Frontend page loads correctly with all components (config, loop controls, activity feed, learning sources). Login has intermittent timing issues in browser automation but works when given sufficient wait time.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent timing issues - login sometimes gets stuck on 'Signing in...' state. Works with longer wait times (15+ seconds).

critical_code_review_comments: All autonomous prospecting endpoints implemented correctly with proper authentication
Meta-cognitive framework (DECOMPOSE → SOLVE → VERIFY → SYNTHESIZE → REFLECT) properly implemented in all loops
Competitor sources (Gong, Outreach, ZoomInfo, SalesLoft, Apollo, Regie.ai) correctly configured
Frontend page has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Activity feed shows real-time updates from autonomous cycles
Learning sources display correctly with topics

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all components load, navigation works, data displays correctly)

seed_data_creation: Previous autonomous cycles created prospects and learnings visible in the UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Autonomous Prospecting feature at /autonomous is fully functional. All 9 backend endpoints tested: GET /api/autonomous/competitor-sources (no auth), GET /api/autonomous/status, GET /api/autonomous/learnings, POST /api/autonomous/loops/discovery, POST /api/autonomous/loops/research, POST /api/autonomous/loops/outreach, POST /api/autonomous/loops/learning, POST /api/autonomous/start, POST /api/autonomous/stop. Frontend shows Engine Configuration, Manual Loop Control, Activity Feed, Learning Sources, and Recent Learnings sections. Login may require longer wait times (15+ seconds) in browser automation.

backend: GET /api/autonomous/competitor-sources - PASS (returns 6 sources: Gong, Outreach, ZoomInfo, SalesLoft, Apollo, Regie.ai)
GET /api/autonomous/status - PASS (returns activeSession, recentActivity, recentLearnings, isRunning)
GET /api/autonomous/learnings - PASS (returns array of learnings with effectiveness scores)
POST /api/autonomous/loops/discovery - PASS (runs discovery loop with 5 phases)
POST /api/autonomous/loops/research - PASS (runs research loop on prospects)
POST /api/autonomous/start - PASS (starts autonomous engine, returns sessionId)

competitor_sources_endpoint.details: Returns 6 competitor platforms: Gong, Outreach, ZoomInfo, SalesLoft, Apollo.io, Regie.ai with learn_topics

discovery_loop.details: Runs all 5 meta-cognitive phases (decompose, solve, verify, synthesize, reflect), finds prospects

research_loop.details: Researches companies, creates profiles, updates prospects with outreach angles

outreach_loop.details: Generates personalized email drafts with quality scoring

learning_loop.details: Analyzes competitor platforms, extracts techniques, provides recommendations

autonomous_engine_start_stop.details: Start creates session with config, stop terminates running sessions

status_endpoint.details: Returns activeSession, recentActivity, recentLearnings, isRunning flag

frontend_page.details: All components render correctly: config, loop controls, activity feed, learning sources, recent learnings
